task_completion.description: Open the AAV2 reference genome in UGENE
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE graphical interface showing 'aav2_genome.fasta' loaded in the sequence viewer or project tree.

task_completion.description: Configure the Find Repeats dialog with specified parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE 'Find Repeats' dialog box visible with 'Inverted' repeats selected, Window size set to 50, Minimum identity set to 85%, and the 'Filter: disjoint repeats nested' option checked.

task_completion.description: Execute the search and locate the inverted repeats
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE sequence viewer or annotations tree displaying the newly found inverted repeat annotations (ITRs) on the sequence.

task_completion.description: Export the annotated sequence to a GenBank file
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE export dialog or a file manager/terminal showing 'aav2_annotated.gb' successfully saved in the '~/UGENE_Data/gene_therapy/results/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create a text report with genome length, repeat count, and ITR coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'itr_report.txt' containing the total genome length (4679), the number of inverted repeats found, and the start/end coordinates for both the 5' and 3' ITRs.

integrity.description: The agent used the UGENE graphical interface to perform the sequence analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with UGENE menus, dialogs, and sequence viewers, rather than using command-line bioinformatics tools or Python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the coordinates from the actual UGENE results
integrity.visual_evidence: The coordinates typed into the report match the annotations visible in the UGENE results pane in earlier screenshots, rather than being pasted from an external source or hallucinated.

integrity.description: The agent saved the output files in the exact requested directory
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in save dialogs, text editors, or terminal windows explicitly show '~/UGENE_Data/gene_therapy/results/' for both the .gb and .txt files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The AAV2 genome length is exactly 4679 bp. The 5' ITR is expected to be found in the range 1 to 150 (specifically 1..145). The 3' ITR is expected to be found in the range 4500 to 4679 (specifically 4535..4679). The final report must include this length and coordinates falling within these expected ranges.
